oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Camelid practice tips and tricks
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Miller, Blake
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: camelids
anesthesia
castration
ultrasound
dentistry
field surgery
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This presentation highlights practical approaches to camelid veterinary medicine, focusing on normal health parameters, field anesthesia protocols, castration techniques, ultrasonogra­phy and dental care. With step-by-step guidance and field-ready protocols, attendees will gain confidence in managing common camelid procedures. Emphasis is placed on safety, effective­ness, and animal welfare, equipping practitioners with tools to provide high-quality care in both field and hospital settings.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 200
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
